care_objectives.objective: To minimise the risk of falls and prevent injury by ensuring a safe environment, providing appropriate support during mobility and daily activities, and promoting the individual’s independence while maintaining their safety. The objective is to identify risks early, implement effective fall-prevention measures, and respond promptly to any changes in condition to maintain the individual’s wellbeing and confidence.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Falls risk assessments reviewed and updated regularly and after any incident

care_tasks.description: Provide assistance when standing, walking, or changing position
care_tasks.special_instructions:
Do not leave the individual unattended during transfers or when mobilising

Encourage the individual to move slowly and to ask for assistance at all time

care_objectives.objective: Maintenance of skin integrity
Prevention of falls and related injuries
Stabilised mood following bereavement
Consistent participation in religious services
Adherence to medication regime

risk_factors.risk: High risk of falls and injury
risk_factors.control_measures: High falls risk identified; requires supervised mobility and use of a walking frame. Medication risk managed through staff administration. Low-to-moderate skin integrity risk due to reduced mobility; monitoring required. Potential for confusion regarding time due to MCI.

High falls risk identified; requires supervised mobility and use of a walking frame. Medication risk managed through staff administration. Low-to-moderate skin integrity risk due to reduced mobility; monitoring required. Potential for confusion regarding time due to MCI.

care_objectives.objective: Engage Emma in weekly structured emotional wellbeing activities to enhance her coping strategies for anxiety and ADHD management.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Participation in 10 activities per month; reported reduction in anxiety levels by 20%.

care_objectives.objective: Achieve a regular sleep pattern with a reduction in sleep disruptions to improve overall quality of sleep for Emma.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Sleeping through the night at least 5 out of 7 nights per week for 2 consecutive months.

care_objectives.objective: Create a personal hygiene routine that Emma can follow independently, leading to improved self-esteem and personal care skills.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Independent completion of personal hygiene tasks (bathing, teeth brushing) 5 days a week for 2 months.

care_objectives.objective: Support Emma in developing healthier lifestyle habits, including nutrition and exercise, to reduce risk factors associated with ADHD and wellbeing.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Participation in at least 15 healthy meal preparations and 30 minutes of physical activity per week.

care_objectives.objective: Decrease reliance on nicotine from e-cigarette to 0mg over 6 months, promoting a healthier lifestyle and reducing health risks.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Successful shift from 10mg to 0mg by monthly tapering plan; monitored reduction in cravings and withdrawal symptoms.

care_tasks.task_name: Monitor and record emotional wellbeing sessions with CAMHS
care_tasks.special_instructions: Document any notable changes in behavior or mood after sessions.
Ensure Emma takes the correct dosage and is prepared for sleep thereafter.
Assist if needed but encourage Emma to perform tasks independently.

care_tasks.task_name: Encourage involvement in healthy meal preparation
care_tasks.special_instructions: Promote independence by allowing Emma to take the lead on preparing meals.

care_tasks.task_name: Weekly physical activity or sports engagement
care_tasks.special_instructions: Engage in activities that Emma enjoys; monitor impact on mood and behavior.

risk_factors.risk: Risk of self-harm due to anxiety or emotional distress
risk_factors.control_measures: Regular check-ins after therapy sessions and encouraging open communication about feelings.

risk_factors.risk: Substance misuse relapse due to social influences
risk_factors.control_measures: Ongoing education about substance misuse and coping strategies; parental involvement in discussions.
Consistent administration of Melatonin and sleep hygiene practices; monitor sleep patterns.

risk_factors.risk: Potential for social isolation if not engaged in activities
risk_factors.control_measures: Facilitate inclusion in peer groups or community activities.

risk_factors.risk: Health complications from dental surgery recovery
risk_factors.control_measures: Regular monitoring of recovery and ensuring pain management strategies are followed.

care_objectives.objective: Enhance emotional wellbeing through weekly CAMHS sessions and additional supportive interventions.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Regular feedback from CAMHS, reduced self-harm incidents, and emotional check-ins with care staff.

care_objectives.objective: Establish a consistent sleep routine with the use of melatonin and sleep hygiene practices.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Improved sleep quality reported by Emma on a weekly log, reduction in sleep disruption incidents.

care_objectives.objective: Decrease e-cigarette nicotine levels safely to 5mg.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Weekly monitoring of nicotine levels and adherence to the reduction schedule, reduction in cravings reported.

care_objectives.objective: Support Emma in making healthy lifestyle choices relating to diet and physical activity.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Monthly review of dietary choices and physical activity log, improved nutritional intake, and increased exercise participation.

care_objectives.objective: Develop educational support structures in collaboration with school and care staff to aid learning.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Tracking academic progress with school reports and feedback from teachers, increased rates of homework completion.

care_tasks.task_name: Weekly emotional wellbeing support through CAMHS
care_tasks.special_instructions: Ensure feedback is shared with care team post-session.

care_tasks.task_name: Track sleep patterns and melatonin intake
care_tasks.special_instructions: Use a sleep diary to document melatonin use and sleep quality.
Involve Emma in choosing healthy options, consider any allergies.
Coordinate with school staff and family for effective strategies.

care_tasks.task_name: Daily reminders and tracking for nicotine reduction
care_tasks.special_instructions: Monitor progress in nicotine levels and encourage dialogue about challenges.

risk_factors.risk: Increased risk of self-harm due to mental health issues
risk_factors.control_measures: Regular emotional support meetings with CAMHS, constant monitoring by care staff, emergency protocol in place.

risk_factors.risk: Possible negative reactions to medication or vaping withdrawal
risk_factors.control_measures: Continuous monitoring of symptoms, scheduled consultations with CAMHS for medication management.

risk_factors.risk: Delay in dermatology referral affecting skin condition management
risk_factors.control_measures: Follow-up with medical team for timely review and appointment, ensure skin care routine is maintained.
Enforce strict sleep hygiene practices, monitoring of melatonin, and ensuring a calming bedtime routine.

care_objectives.objective: Improve personal care independence by teaching Ruby adequate personal hygiene practices.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Ruby will demonstrate at least 60% independence in personal care tasks by herself.

care_objectives.objective: Ensure adherence to nutritional needs to promote overall health and development.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Ruby will achieve a balanced diet by having at least 3 meals and 2 snacks daily with proper nutritional intake as per dietician's recommendations.

care_objectives.objective: Enhance social engagement by participating in community activities at least once a week.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Ruby will attend a community activity twice a month to foster social skills and relationships.

care_objectives.objective: Establish a routine for medication management to ensure compliance with prescribed treatments.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Ruby will take prescribed medications 95% of the time without errors in the next 6 months.

care_objectives.objective: Develop emotional well-being strategies through regular emotional support sessions.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Ruby will report a satisfaction level of 4 or higher on a scale of 1-5 in her emotional well-being assessment.

care_tasks.task_name: Assist with morning personal hygiene routine
care_tasks.special_instructions: Ensure privacy, provide prompts for each task, and encourage independence as much as possible.
Follow dietary recommendations; use adaptive utensils if necessary; encourage Ruby to help with meal prep to enhance skills.
Check the medication chart before administering; educate Ruby about her medication.
Research local events and encourage Ruby to select preferred activities.
Create a safe space for discussion; allow Ruby to express her feelings freely.

risk_factors.risk: Nutritional deficiencies from poor diet management.

Use medication reminders and charts; continuous education on the importance of adherence.

risk_factors.control_measures: Encourage participation in community activities and provide emotional support sessions.

care_objectives.objective: Increase school attendance to 80% by attending at least 4 out of 5 school days weekly.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: School attendance records, feedback from school.

care_objectives.objective: Enhance emotional management skills through weekly counseling sessions for the next 3 months.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Session attendance records, evaluation forms from counselor.

care_objectives.objective: Achieve a balanced diet with at least 5 servings of fruits/vegetables daily, assessed weekly.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Food diary review, nutritionist feedback.

care_objectives.objective: Complete annual optician review and resolve dental issues by 2024.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Appointment confirmation, dental records.

care_objectives.objective: Establish a sleep regimen to improve quality to at least 8 hours nightly within 6 months.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Sleep logs, feedback from caregivers.

care_tasks.special_instructions: Ensure Logan feels comfortable and safe to express feelings.

care_tasks.task_name: Meal planning with nutrients focusing on balanced diet
care_tasks.special_instructions: Include variety of foods, avoided allergens like cheese.
Monitor Zolmitriptan and document adherence; encourage taking Folic Acid.
Assist Logan in choosing activities; ensure he remains hydrated.
Use visual aids, toothpaste that he prefers, ensure comfort.

risk_factors.control_measures: Prepare Logan ahead of appointments, use relaxation techniques prior to visits.

risk_factors.risk: Medication nonadherence due to side effects or refusal
risk_factors.control_measures: Educate on medication importance; involve family in discussions.
Counseling support focused on substance misuse; monitoring for harmful behavior.

risk_factors.control_measures: Monitor for reactions, use hypoallergenic products, dermatology follow-up once available.

care_objectives.outcome_measures: School attendance records

care_objectives.objective: Logan will demonstrate improved emotional regulation by identifying and expressing feelings in 3 sessions per month.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Documentation of sessions attended and self-report; feedback from the therapist

care_objectives.objective: Logan will engage in physical exercise for at least 30 minutes, three times a week.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Log of exercise sessions completed

care_objectives.objective: Logan will successfully manage his medication regimen with 90% adherence over the next year.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Medication logs reviewed

care_objectives.objective: Logan will have completed two sessions with a CAMHS therapist by the end of the next six months.
care_objectives.outcome_measures: Records of therapy attendance and feedback from the therapist

care_tasks.special_instructions: Discuss feelings and coping strategies.
Incorporate 5 fruits and vegetables; avoid triggers.
Encourage brusing teeth and showering independently if possible.
Check logs to ensure compliance with prescribed medications.
Use visuals to reduce anxiety about dental care; reinforce positive experiences.

risk_factors.control_measures: Provide education on health impacts and alternative coping strategies.
Desensitization strategies and positive reinforcement for dentist visits.

risk_factors.risk: Non-compliance with medication due to ADHD symptoms
risk_factors.control_measures: Develop a medication schedule and use reminders; support from caregivers.

risk_factors.risk: Emotional distress due to ADHD symptoms
risk_factors.control_measures: Regular mental health check-ins and therapy support.

risk_factors.risk: Health issues related to poor diet and exercise
risk_factors.control_measures: Implementation of a nutrition plan and physical activity schedule.

physical_health.nutrition: No specific dietary requirements, but Logan can be selective with food choices. Enjoys a wide variety of foods, has a sweet tooth and loves chocolate (to be consumed in moderation). Encouraged to maintain a healthy balanced diet, consume 5 a day (fruits and vegetables), participate in menu planning, and choose healthier alternatives. Advised to be mindful of headache triggers like cheese, coke, caffeine, chocolate, and citrus.

mental_health.communication_needs: Open up about past experiences to CAMHS worker Nina. Speak about feelings with the team. Engage with team during keywork sessions. Communicate wishes and feelings effectively. Express feelings without swearing. Talk to the team about important areas of care or for general catch-ups. Team to offer advice and support when needed.

daily_routine.morning: Morning (School days): Good morning greeting around 07:30, cup of tea, encouragement to get up for education. Offered various breakfast options (toast, hash browns, caramel iced latte). Team helps with hair. Encouraged to wash and brush teeth. Phone usage on journey to school is conditional on previous day's behaviour. Morning (Weekends/Holidays): Greeted around 10:00, relaxation, watching TV, speaking with team, breakfast together. Evening: Upon returning from school, phone is handed in for an hour of relaxation and reflection. Phone can be returned after school if not taken on journey. Offered choice of activities. Dinner between 5-6pm. Encouraged to shower and brush teeth at 21:00. Settle in room at 22:30 for beauty sleep. Mobile phone handed in at 22:00 for sleep hygiene. 6mg Melatonin administered after supper. Team will spend time in bedroom if requested for talking or watching videos.

physical_health.nutrition: Normal textured diet, small appetite, requires encouragement and monitoring, prefers medication given with food. No known food allergies or specific dietary restrictions.

mental_health.communication_needs: Hearing impaired (uses hearing aids), reduced vision. Communicates verbally with reassurance, requires clear, slow speech.

care_objectives.objective: Test

care_tasks.description: I like to have a warm shower and clean my teeth as soon as I am woken
care_tasks.special_instructions: Please assist with getting undressed and in to the shower

care_tasks.description: I like to have a coffee with milk and 2 sugars
care_tasks.special_instructions: I like my coffee very milky

care_tasks.description: Ensure my morning dose of 5mg is given after my coffee
care_tasks.special_instructions: Ensure task is completed in medication management

medications.name: Paracetamol
medications.purpose: I suffer from headaches after my warfrain

medications.name: E45
medications.special_instructions: Ensure a smooth layer all over her left forearm

likes: Having my shower as soon as I wake up
preferences.social_preferences: I like to be amongst people whenever possible and love to go walking
preferences.personal_care_preferences: I like to be offered help with any personal care

risk_factors.control_measures: When I go walking please ensure I am accompanied. I like to walk to the local park first thing, but do need regular rests and a sit down

physical_health.nutrition: No specific dietary requirements. Can be selective but generally consumes healthy, balanced foods. Has a sweet tooth and enjoys chocolate. Team promotes a balanced diet by involving Logan in menu planning, offering healthy alternatives, and ensuring availability of favorite fruits and vegetables.

mental_health.communication_needs: Engages well with her CAMHS worker, Nina, and can open up about past experiences. Speaks confidently to adults and professionals. Can sometimes struggle to express feelings without swearing. May exaggerate situations or relay negative information about team members to others, requiring careful handling from the team. Benefits from calm talking and active listening.

daily_routine.morning: Morning (school days): Greeted at 07:30 with tea, encouraged to get up, offered breakfast options. Team offers help with hair. Reminders for washing/brushing teeth. Bedroom tidied by team. Encouraged to attend school with incentives. Phone use on journey conditional on previous day's behavior. Morning (weekends/holidays): Greeted at 10:00 to support sleep routine, time for relaxing, TV, speaking with team, and breakfast. Evening: Returns from school, hands in phone for 1 hour of relaxation, reflects on school day, and may speak to the team. Offered choice of activities. Dinner between 5-6pm (team prepares), sit together, talk. Encouraged to go out with friends. Shower/brush teeth by 21:00. Settles in room by 22:30. Hands in mobile phone by 22:00 for sleep hygiene. Receives 3x2mg Melatonin after supper. Sometimes asks team to spend time in her bedroom for discussions or company.

mental_health.communication_needs: Logan is confident speaking to adults but often observes peers before interacting. Communication strategies include: 1:1 talks, calm tone, active listening, asking for needs, respecting her space, avoiding raised voices, speaking slowly and clearly, and avoiding confrontation or discussing family matters negatively.

daily_routine.morning: Structured routines and consistent boundaries are in place, which Logan generally responds well to. A robust evening routine is established to support sleep hygiene, including medication.

care_tasks.description: Eleanor likes to take a shower and clean her teeth first thing after waking
care_tasks.special_instructions: Please help me to get in to the shower and make sure my favourite shampoo is ready for me. Once I have had my shower, please remind me to brush my teeth

care_tasks.description: Tea with 2 sugars and a splash of milk
care_tasks.special_instructions: I like a little splash of milk in my tea, with 2 sugars

physical_health.nutrition: Independent with meal preparation using adapted equipment
physical_health.skin_integrity: Good, no concerns. Regular skin checks due to wheelchair use
physical_health.pain_management: Chronic back pain managed with prescribed medications

care_needs.support_required: Assistance with bed to wheelchair transfer, washing upper body and back
care_needs.preferred_approach: Prefers male carer, values independence - only assist where needed

care_needs.preferred_approach: Male carer preferred, ensure bedroom is warm

daily_routine.afternoon: Independent - may go out in community or work from home

daily_routine.morning: Wake 7:30am, assistance with washing/dressing, breakfast 8:30am, medications 9am, morning activity 10:30am
daily_routine.afternoon: Lunch 12:30pm, rest period 2-3pm, afternoon tea 3:30pm, activities or social time

daily_routine.night: In bed by 9:30pm, night checks every 2 hours for repositioning, PRN medications available if needed
